scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Multi-File Review with Cross-File Bugs
justification: All pass criteria met: JWT_SECRET undefined risk identified as Critical with correct explanation of non-null assertion behavior; unauthenticated location endpoint identified as privacy/enumeration issue; cross-file analysis performed (noted location endpoint lacks requireAuth used in other route, and IDOR on authenticated route); safe_to_deploy false; both fixes are specific and actionable.

observations.text: JWT_SECRET non-null assertion correctly identified as Critical with nuanced explanation of library-dependent behavior (crash vs silent accept)
Unauthenticated location endpoint flagged with enumeration risk and suggestion to use tracking tokens instead of internal IDs
Cross-file analysis: identified IDOR on authenticated route AND missing auth on location route as separate but related findings
Startup validation fix for JWT_SECRET is exactly the recommended approach (fail fast)
Bonus finding: null delivery returned as 200 OK instead of 404 — valid additional issue not in rubric
Location endpoint privacy issue is in important_issues rather than critical_findings — could be argued it deserves Critical severity since it leaks real-time location data without any authentication
